languages.text: {n}Остановив взгляд на вас, Себериан чуть склоняет голову в приветствии.{/n} "{mf|Лорд|Леди} Гапрак. Ваш дом всегда служил династии верой и правдой. Я ожидаю, что и сейчас вы поддержите меня ценным советом".

traits.locale_text: [draft] Себериан узнает в нас Гапрака, позволяет остаться на совете, возможно мы будем полезны.

languages.text: {n}Letting his gaze rest on you, Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served the dynasty faithfully. I expect you to aid me now with your valuable counsel as well."
languages.original_text: {n}Остановив взгляд на вас, Себериан чуть склоняет голову в приветствии.{/n} "{mf|Лорд|Леди} Гапрак. Ваш дом всегда служил династии верой и правдой. Я ожидаю, что и сейчас вы поддержите меня ценным советом".

traits.locale_text: {n}Letting his gaze rest on you, Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served the dynasty faithfully. I expect you to aid me now with your valuable counsel as well."

{n}Letting his gaze rest on you, Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served the dynasty faithfully. I expect you to aid me now with your valuable counsel as well."

{n}Letting his gaze rest on you, Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served the dynasty faithfully. I expect you to aid me now with your valuable counsel as well."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安注视着你，微微点头致意。{/n}“贾帕克{mf|大人|女士}，你的家族一向忠心耿耿地侍奉王朝。我希望你此刻也能用你的宝贵意见助我一臂之力。”
languages.original_text: {n}Letting his gaze rest on you, Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served the dynasty faithfully. I expect you to aid me now with your valuable counsel as well."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安注视着你，微微点头致意。{/n}“贾帕克{mf|大人|女士}，你的家族一向忠心耿耿地侍奉王朝。我希望你此刻也能用你的宝贵意见助我一臂之力。”

languages.text: {n}Laissant son regard se poser sur vous, Seberian incline légèrement la tête en guise de salut.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur|Dame} Gaprak. Votre maison a toujours servi la dynastie avec la plus grande loyauté. J'attends à ce titre également votre aide au sein de ce conseil. »
languages.original_text: {n}Letting his gaze rest on you, Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served the dynasty faithfully. I expect you to aid me now with your valuable counsel as well."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laissant son regard se poser sur vous, Seberian incline légèrement la tête en guise de salut.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur|Dame} Gaprak. Votre maison a toujours servi la dynastie avec la plus grande loyauté. J'attends à ce titre également votre aide au sein de ce conseil. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian se fija en ti e inclina ligeramente la cabeza a modo de saludo.{/n} «{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Su casa siempre ha servido fielmente a la dinastía, y espero poder contar con su valioso consejo en estos momentos».
languages.original_text: {n}Letting his gaze rest on you, Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served the dynasty faithfully. I expect you to aid me now with your valuable counsel as well."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian se fija en ti e inclina ligeramente la cabeza a modo de saludo.{/n} «{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Su casa siempre ha servido fielmente a la dinastía, y espero poder contar con su valioso consejo en estos momentos».

languages.text: {n}Bakışlarını senden çekmeyen Seberian, başını hafifçe eğerek seni selamlıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Gaprak. Hanen, hanedanlığa her zaman sadakatle hizmet etmiştir. Şimdi de değerli tavsiyelerinle bana yardım etmeni bekliyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Letting his gaze rest on you, Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served the dynasty faithfully. I expect you to aid me now with your valuable counsel as well."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bakışlarını senden çekmeyen Seberian, başını hafifçe eğerek seni selamlıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Gaprak. Hanen, hanedanlığa her zaman sadakatle hizmet etmiştir. Şimdi de değerli tavsiyelerinle bana yardım etmeni bekliyorum."

languages.text: {n}Seberian richtet seinen Blick auf dich und senkt seinen Kopf leicht zum Gruß.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Euer Haus hat der Dynastie stets treu gedient Ich erwarte, dass Ihr mir auch jetzt mit Eurem wertvollen Rat zur Seite steht."
languages.original_text: {n}Letting his gaze rest on you, Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served the dynasty faithfully. I expect you to aid me now with your valuable counsel as well."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian richtet seinen Blick auf dich und senkt seinen Kopf leicht zum Gruß.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Euer Haus hat der Dynastie stets treu gedient Ich erwarte, dass Ihr mir auch jetzt mit Eurem wertvollen Rat zur Seite steht."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンはあなたを見つめながら、軽く頭を下げて挨拶する。{/n}「{mf|ロード|レディ}・ガプラク。貴家の家系は、王朝に忠実に仕えてきました。貴方の貴重な助言を、今こそ頼りたいと思います。」
languages.original_text: {n}Letting his gaze rest on you, Seberian inclines his head slightly in greeting.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served the dynasty faithfully. I expect you to aid me now with your valuable counsel as well."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンはあなたを見つめながら、軽く頭を下げて挨拶する。{/n}「{mf|ロード|レディ}・ガプラク。貴家の家系は、王朝に忠実に仕えてきました。貴方の貴重な助言を、今こそ頼りたいと思います。」
